0.name: At-Risk Dormant
0.description: Previously active customers who have significantly reduced or stopped ordering. Require intervention to prevent churn.
recommended_actions: Review past orders for personalized outreach
0.engagement_strategy: Win-back - understand why they left and address concerns
0.risk_level: Critical - likely to churn without action

1.name: New Prospects
1.description: Recently acquired customers with limited order history. Potential for development based on initial engagement.
recommended_actions: Provide product catalog and capabilities overview
1.engagement_strategy: Onboard effectively - strong first impressions drive retention

2.name: Growth Potential
2.description: Customers with moderate spend but showing growth trajectory. Recent increases in order frequency or value indicate expansion potential.
recommended_actions: Provide case studies from similar companies
2.engagement_strategy: Nurture and develop - invest in relationship building

3.name: High-Value Regulars
3.description: Premium customers with high order frequency and substantial spend. These are your most valuable accounts with consistent ordering patterns.
recommended_actions: Offer volume discounts and loyalty rewards
3.engagement_strategy: Retain and grow - these customers drive profitability

4.name: Occasional Buyers
4.description: Infrequent purchasers with sporadic ordering patterns. Typically project-based or seasonal needs.
recommended_actions: Survey for feedback on why orders stopped
4.engagement_strategy: Re-activate - understand barriers and reduce friction
